targetTranslation: when (referring to a future time and introducing the condition جَآءَ 'comes')
ayahEnglish: When the victory of Allāh has come and the conquest,
When the victory of Allāh has come and the conquest,
When the victory of Allāh has come and the conquest,
When the victory of Allāh has come and the conquest,

targetTranslation: they enter (referring to people entering اللَّهِ دِينِ - Allah's religion)
ayahArabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
ayahEnglish: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allāh in multitudes,

ayahArabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
ayahEnglish: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allāh in multitudes,

ayahArabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
ayahEnglish: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allāh in multitudes,

targetTranslation: in groups (describing how people are entering)
ayahArabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
ayahEnglish: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allāh in multitudes,

ayahArabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
ayahEnglish: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of Repentance.

ayahArabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
ayahEnglish: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of Repentance.

targetTranslation: one who constantly accepts repentance (describing كَانَ - He was)
ayahArabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
ayahEnglish: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of Repentance.
